items.title: Something Is Happening Under Pluto's Surface
items.author: Astrum
items.content:
<article>Will Pluto ever be a planet again?
Check out Ouranos with this link to find the best stargazing conditions and make the most of your next observing session: http://ouranos-app.com/download - start with a 7 day-free trial or grab 30% off an annual subscription

▀▀▀▀▀▀

This Astrum supercut explores our favourite dwarf planet: Pluto. We’ll discover why its planetary status really got revoked, take a closer look at what’s hiding under the surface, and reveal the surprising discoveries on its largest moon, Charon. 

To those returning and new to the channel: This video is a supercut of some of Astrum’s best Pluto videos, plus new and updated content. We’ve edited this into a new seamless video, remastered in 4K resolution.

▀▀▀▀▀▀

0:00 Pluto
2:05 New Horizons Images
4:55 Pluto’s Heart
9:21 Subsurface Ocean
11:25 Cryovolcanoes
13:03 Charon
17:29 Double Planet 
20:53 What Is a Planet?
23:14 The Kiss and Capture Theory
26:20 Charon’s Surface
29:36 Cryovolcanoes on Charon
31:55 Mordor Macula: Charon’s Red Spot
35:56 Will Pluto Be a Planet Again?

▀▀▀▀▀▀

items.title: This Moon Collision Did Something Crazy on Earth
items.author: Astrum
items.content:
<article>What created Tycho crater?
Get a 10% discount on your next VisiSolar purchase when you use code ASTRUM2026 or the following link: https://visisolar.com/discount/ASTRUM2026

▀▀▀▀▀▀

Our Moon is covered with scars, but one is more recognisable than any other: Tycho. Formed in a violent impact that sent debris flying toward Earth, this iconic crater holds clues to the Moon’s hidden secrets. In this video, we’re digging into the evidence to discover what collided with the Moon, what happened here on Earth, and why the timeline still puzzles scientists today.

▀▀▀▀▀▀

0:00 Tycho Crater
2:24 Central Mountain
4:45 Lava Tsunami 
7:43 Aftermath
8:39 Landslide 
10:59 Raining Glass 
12:03 Seen From Earth
13:08 Raining Glass on Earth
13:57 How Old Is Tycho?
15:55 Fresh Crater
17:17 Earth-Moon Exchange

▀▀▀▀▀▀

items.title: Sagittarius A* Might Not Be a Black Hole
items.author: Astrum
items.content:
<article>A new theory suggests Sagittarius A* might not be a black hole after all.
Start speaking a new language in 3 weeks with Babbel 🎉. Get up to 55% OFF ➡️ Here: https://bit.ly/AstrumJun26

▀▀▀▀▀▀

A new theory is challenging everything we know about Sagittarius A*, the supermassive object at the heart of our galaxy. For decades, physicists have been certain it’s a black hole. They have observed its effects and even built a planet-sized telescope just to image it. But now, a mind-bending theory is turning our understanding upside down. What if Sagittarius A* isn’t a black hole at all, but something far stranger?

▀▀▀▀▀▀

0:00 Sagittarius A*
1:44 Supermassive Black Hole
6:51 Not a Black Hole?
7:49 The Black Hole Problem
9:36 Dark Matter Core
11:23 What Is Dark Matter?
13:36 Dark Fermions
17:06 The Rotation Problem
18:49 Event Horizon Telescope
21:33 Photon Ring
23:16 More Evidence

items.title: Something Came Out of 3I/ATLAS
items.author: Astrum
items.content:
<article>3I/ATLAS will soon be gone forever, and it just did the strangest thing yet. 
Buy the DWARF Mini & Mini Tripod and receive a free Mini Bag, while supplies last. Get yours here: https://bit.ly/4duBnX9

▀▀▀▀▀▀

3I/ATLAS is leaving the Solar System. Having flown past Jupiter and now rapidly receding into deep space, the interstellar object has scientists scrambling to make final observations before it is out of reach forever. In our fourth and final video about 3I/ATLAS, we're digging into the final images we might ever see of it, the latest discoveries from its loop around our Sun, and the mysterious explosion that could change everything we know.

Watch our previous videos about 3I/ATLAS here -
Part 1: https://youtu.be/XEggZo3SXNM 
Part 2: https://youtu.be/bwJgcflf0lM
Part 3: https://youtu.be/zk0YoiJDSSQ 

▀▀▀▀▀▀

0:00 3I/ATLAS Is Leaving
1:35 Explosion
3:54 X-Ray Halo
7:22 3I/ATLAS’s Heartbeat
8:43 3I/ATLAS’s Size
10:35 Symmetrical Jets
11:42 Europa Clipper
13:43 JUICE
15:36 Parker Solar Probe
16:03 TESS
17:16 How Old Is 3I/ATLAS?

items.title: This Isn’t Sci-Fi. It’s the Future of Space Travel
items.author: Astrum
items.content:
<article>The future of space travel might be closer than you think.
If you love learning about science as much as I do, head to http://brilliant.org/astrum to learn for free for a full 30 days. You'll also receive 20% off a premium annual subscription, giving you unlimited access to everything on Brilliant.

▀▀▀▀▀▀

Could we actually unlock interstellar travel, or is it destined to stay in science fiction? ​​What technology will actually get us there? In this video, we’re diving into the mind-blowing tech currently in development - and the wild concepts still a way off - that could finally take us to the stars. Some of these will definitely surprise you.

▀▀▀▀▀▀

0:00 Space Travel
2:15 How Rockets Work
4:57 Ion Engines
10:19 Space Elevator
12:16 Nuclear Rockets
15:03 Solar Sails
17:33 Space Tethers
19:29 Warp Drive
22:15 Laser & Electron Beams

▀▀▀▀▀▀
